summary.key_theme: 儘管 GE Aerospace 第一季財報表現優於預期，但因未上調全年財測導致股價回調，且面臨地緣政治引發的燃油成本壓力，市場情緒呈現多空拉鋸。

bullish.title: GE Stock Drops After Earnings. Citi Says Buy the Dip.
bullish.reason: 花旗分析師認為儘管財報後股價下跌，但 GE Aerospace 的需求依然強勁，建議投資人逢低買進。

bullish.title: GE Aerospace Backlog, Demand Strength Likely to Offset Oil Price Concerns, Morgan Stanley Says
bullish.reason: 摩根士丹利指出，強勁的訂單積壓與需求將能抵銷油價上漲帶來的成本壓力，看好長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Wells Fargo Asserts GE Aerospace (GE) Growth Prospects on Leap SV Ramp
bullish.reason: 富國銀行肯定 LEAP 引擎產能提升帶來的成長前景，維持對該公司的正面展望。

bullish.title: GE Q1 Deep Dive: Aftermarket Momentum and Supply Challenges Shape Outlook
bullish.reason: 第一季營收年增 29 %，售後市場動能強勁，顯示核心業務基本面穩健。

bullish.title: UBS Maintains Buy on GE Aerospace, Lowers Price Target to $350
bullish.reason: 瑞銀維持買入評級，儘管微幅下調目標價至 350 美元，但仍顯示對公司長期價值的信心。

bearish.title: These 3 Defense Giants Beat Q1 Estimates—So Why Did Their Stocks Still Fall?
bearish.reason: 雖然財報優於預期，但因未能上調全年財測，導致市場失望性賣壓，股價出現修正。

bearish.title: How the Iran Conflict Is Squeezing GE Aerospace's Outlook
bearish.reason: 伊朗衝突導致航空燃油價格與供應不確定性增加，對公司未來的獲利前景構成潛在壓力。

bearish.title: Why GE Aerospace (GE) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
bearish.reason: 財報公布後股價單日下跌 4.8 %，反映市場對短期成長動能放緩的擔憂。

bearish.title: GE Vernova Defies Odds and Surpasses GE Aerospace in Market Value
bearish.reason: GE Vernova 市值超越 GE Aerospace，顯示市場資金轉向能源轉型題材，對 GE Aerospace 的相對吸引力造成壓力。

neutral.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Amazon, Apple, GE Aerospace, UnitedHealth & more
neutral.reason: 僅為盤前波動的例行性報導，未提供具體基本面分析。

neutral.title: Boeing vs GE Aerospace After Earnings: Why the Market Is Picking One Over the Other
neutral.reason: 比較波音與 GE Aerospace 的財報表現，屬於產業分析性質，對股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
neutral.reason: 市場觀察清單，未針對 GE Aerospace 提供特定觀點。
